name: Chicken Almondine
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin, bone and pound chicken breasts between waxed paper until thin.
2. Combine pimientos, bell pepper, onion and ginger. Stuff equal amounts into each chicken breast and roll up.
3. Mix 1/2 cup mayonnaise with milk in a separate bowl.
4. Dredge the stuffed chicken breasts in flour, then brush with the mayonnaise mixture.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
6. In another saucepan, mix Velveeta cheese, 1/2 cup mayonnaise and crushed pineapple with juice until smooth.
7. Place the cooked chicken on a platter, cover with the sauce, and top with slivered toasted almonds.
